Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
5.1 HEALTH
Health
(sometimes also called
HP
), represents your physical well-being. When
your health (which you can see by typing
SCORE
or by putting
PROMPT
STATS
on -
see
HELP
PROMPT) reaches 0, you will
die
(unless some special
abilities
or
protections comes into play).
Your maximum health may be increased:
- by rising in
level
(this caps out around level 80),
- by various magical means, and
- by acquiring certain
artefacts
,
- by completing certain
quests
Higher maximum health is always better than lower!
Some abilities used to
combat
other
adventurers cause damage partly based on
maximum health. This means that with higher maximum health you should expect an
increase in some damage received from other adventurers, though the increase is
not as great as the amount by which your own health rose. In any case, you will
definitely be able to withstand more
attacks
before
dying
, which is the
important
thing
.
Read
about how to recover
lost
health in
HELP RECOVERY
.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
